sliderItems.title: Driving License Facilitation Counter Launched at ICCI
sliderItems.description: In collaboration with Islamabad Traffic Police, a new facilitation counter is now operational at the ICCI premises for members and their families.

sliderItems.title: Business Delegation to Canton Fair Autumn 2026
sliderItems.description: ICCI is organizing an official business delegation to the Canton Fair, China. Registration expressions of interest are now open for executive members.

newsPosts.title: ICCI Welcomes Annual Pink Ribbon Session to Promote Health Awareness
newsPosts.summary: The Islamabad Chamber of Commerce & Industry organized an extensive awareness session focusing on corporate social responsibility and community healthcare frameworks.

newsPosts.title: Visa Recommendation Letters: Updated Processing Fees & Criteria
newsPosts.summary: Important notification for all registered corporate and associate classes regarding the streamlined documentation requirements for international trade visas.

newsPosts.title: Change Management Session: Reforming the Regional Economy
newsPosts.summary: Highlighting strategic roadmaps tailored to local startup incubation and policy reforms during the executive body meeting.
